articles.title: Brown expects McLaren to win again ‘sooner rather than later’
articles.summary: Brown expects McLaren to win again ‘sooner rather than later’. Zak Brown is adamant that McLaren will be winning Grands Prix again “sooner rather than later” after two tricky weekends in Australia and China to kick off their season.

articles.title: 10 of the best tears of joy moments in F1 history
articles.summary: 10 of the best tears of joy moments in F1 history. We look back at some of the most emotional moments in Formula 1 that caused the happy tears to flow.

articles.title: F1 launches 2026 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: F1 launches 2026 Sim Racing World Championship. Formula 1 will open the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship at DreamHack Birmingham before staging further events at its new studio facility in Biggin Hill.

articles.title: Antonelli ‘would love’ to do an endurance race with Verstappen
articles.summary: Antonelli ‘would love’ to do an endurance race with Verstappen. Kimi Antonelli has admitted that he “would love” to compete in an endurance race with Max Verstappen in the future, with the latter having recently confirmed that he will take part in the Nurburgring 24 Hours later this season.

articles.title: Norris set for first Madame Tussauds London figure
articles.summary: Norris set for first Madame Tussauds London figure. Lando Norris is set to receive his first-ever Madame Tussauds figure, with the London attraction confirming that the figure will debut this summer.

articles.title: ‘Lewis is my hero’ – Q&A with 'F1 The Movie' star Damson Idris
articles.summary: ‘Lewis is my hero’ – Q&A with 'F1 The Movie' star Damson Idris. Damson Idris sat down for an exclusive Q&A about his experience of filming *F1 The Movie* after becoming a Global Brand Ambassador for F1.

articles.title: The Top 10 youngest Grand Prix winners in F1 history
articles.summary: The Top 10 youngest Grand Prix winners in F1 history. After Kimi Antonelli's stunning performance in China, we look at the youngest F1 stars to ever win a Grand Prix.

articles.title: QUIZ: 10 questions on Italian Formula 1 winners
articles.summary: QUIZ: 10 questions on Italian Formula 1 winners. Kimi Antonelli became the latest Italian driver to win a Grand Prix when he crossed the line in China on Sunday to seal his maiden F1 victory.

articles.title: Who impressed our Power Rankings judges in China?
articles.summary: Who impressed our Power Rankings judges in China?. Find out who topped the Power Rankings table after the Chinese Grand Prix weekend.

articles.title: Jacques Villeneuve on how he shook up the F1 world
articles.summary: Jacques Villeneuve on how he shook up the F1 world. The son of a motorsport legend, a racer since childhood, Formula 1 was Jacques Villeneuve’s destiny. In 1996, the young Canadian arrived at his first Grand Prix and immediately proved he belonged there by taking pole position.

articles.title: Red Bull hopes to make up for ‘significant shortcomings’ before Japan
articles.summary: Red Bull hopes to make up for ‘significant shortcomings’ before Japan. Red Bull team principal Laurent Mekies hopes his team can improve before the Japanese Grand Prix after a tough weekend in China.

articles.title: Hamilton feels he's back to his best after strong start to the season
articles.summary: Hamilton feels he's back to his best after strong start to the season. The Lewis Hamilton of old appears to be back after a promising start to the season.

articles.title: Wolff warns against Antonelli title hype
articles.summary: Wolff warns against Antonelli title hype. Hype is building around Andrea Kimi Antonelli, but Toto Wolff wants the youngster to focus on his development.

articles.title: Drivers set the narrative, but it's up to fans to decide if they like F1's new racing or not
articles.summary: Drivers set the narrative, but it's up to fans to decide if they like F1's new racing or not. Drivers have given their opinions on F1's new regulations so far, but whether you like them or not, it doesn't make you any less of a fan, explains Chris Medland.

articles.title: The RACER Mailbag, March 18
articles.summary: The RACER Mailbag, March 18. The Arlington GP, reactions to and questions about the new F1 formula, and track marshal fact and fiction among topics in the RACER Mailbag this week.

articles.title: Leclerc finding new F1 cars fun for races, less so in qualifying
articles.summary: Leclerc finding new F1 cars fun for races, less so in qualifying. Charles Leclerc says the new generation of Formula 1 cars are fun for racing and have new tactics involved, but need improving in qualifying trim after his duel with Lewis Hamilton in the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Alonso ‘struggling to feel hands and feet’ before Chinese GP retirement
articles.summary: Alonso ‘struggling to feel hands and feet’ before Chinese GP retirement. Fernando Alonso says he was struggling to feel his hands and his feet for a spell of the Chinese Grand Prix before retiring his Aston Martin due to excessive vibrations.Aston Martin and Honda have been working to reduce the imp...

articles.title: Verstappen blasts new F1 rules again, dismisses positive fan reactions
articles.summary: Verstappen blasts new F1 rules again, dismisses positive fan reactions. Max Verstappen says those who like the 2026 races in Formula 1 “don’t know what racing is about” and fired a warning to the sport’s owners after retiring from the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures
articles.summary: Antonelli and Hamilton’s shared firsts hint at bright futures. While Kimi Antonelli enjoyed his first F1 win, the man he replaced marked a first of his own.

articles.title: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner
articles.summary: Emotional Antonelli ends 20-year wait for Italian F1 winner. Kimi Antonelli was on the verge of tears after becoming F1's newest winner – and the first from Italy since Giancarlo Fisichella in 2006.

articles.title: Aston Martin make approach for Audi boss Wheatley
articles.summary: Aston Martin make approach for Audi boss Wheatley. Audi team principal Jonathan Wheatley is wanted by Aston Martin to lead their troubled Formula 1 team.

articles.title: 'Looking like the Hamilton of old' and potential rule changes - F1 Q&A
articles.summary: 'Looking like the Hamilton of old' and potential rule changes - F1 Q&A. BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions following the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1
articles.summary: 'Best racing ever' or 'a joke'? The row over the new F1. Have F1's new rules produced a "battery world championship" or "the best racing ever"? Lewis Hamilton, Max Verstappen and Fernando Alonso sum up the paradox at the heart of the sport.

articles.title: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings
articles.summary: Ferrari's Hamilton 'has mojo back' - driver ratings. BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start
articles.summary: Teen Antonelli wins in China as McLarens fail to start. Kimi Antonelli takes his first Formula 1 victory in leading team-mate George Russell to a Mercedes one-two in the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird. articles.title: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley
articles.summary: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley. The Chequered Podcast's Harry Benjamin, Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss Lewis Hamilton's strong performance in the Australian Grand Prix, plus his 'upbeat, positive' mood over race weekend.

articles.title: Mercedes 'hit ground running' with new F1 car regulations
articles.summary: Mercedes 'hit ground running' with new F1 car regulations. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, former McLaren mechanic Marc Priestly credits Mercedes for the way they have managed to "hit the ground running" on integrating new F1 car regulations.
